author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Full GPU rewrite: (1) Add bmm (batched matmul) via cuBLAS strided batch GEMM. (2) Add GPU permute kernel for head reshaping [B,S,H,D]->[B,H,S,D]. (3) Rewrite attention to stay 100% on GPU — zero data_vec calls in the forward path. (4) Audit every remaining data_vec/ensure_cpu in the hot path and eliminate them.
